Video.summary: Greg will reveal to his girlfriend, Deidra, that he secretly works as a gay, male escort. Next Madrina's boyfriend keeps cheating on her with his ex­. Then Ro-Ro has two girlfriends and today they'll force her to choose between them.
Video.title: Secret Sex Lives

Video.summary: Jada says that one lover is not enough. She wants to confront her boyfriend to tell him that there's someone else. Next Brandy's husband has moved out to be with his mistress, Rachel. Then Danielle confesses to Rashanda that she is the other woman.
Video.title: Lying Loves Confess

Video.summary: Rob hates his brother, Steve, and can't wait to tell him that he's sleeping with his fiancee and she's going home with him! Next Meg will make it clear to her boyfriend that she is serious about her unusual fantasy of having sex with clowns!
Video.title: Springer Scandals

Video.summary: Deciding what you want to be in life can be tough, but telling your loved ones you want to be a porn star can be even harder!
Video.title: Who Wants To Be A Porn Star

Image.alt: Who Wants To Be A Porn Star
Who Wants To Be A Porn Star
Who Wants To Be A Porn Star

Video.summary: Have you ever risked your relationship by revealing a secret? Have you questioned your lovers trust? Today's guests say they are tired of broken promises and they are here to face the truth and fight for their lovers.
Video.title: Lovers Do Battle

Video.summary: Felicia is here to confront her boyfriend and her mother who have been sleeping together for months! Next Susan must come clean to her boyfriend and tell him she's prostituting again!
Video.title: Brawlin' Broads!

Video.summary: Scott has 2 girlfriends, but has no idea that both of them are here today to propose to him!
Video.title: Get Your Own Man!

Video.summary: Taylor's here to reveal that he's been cheating on Jenna with another girl and her stripper cousin! Then, it's a sibling rivalry for the ages when Cody finds out that his girl Amanda has been cheating on him with his own brother Brandon!
Video.title: Your Tears Mean Nothing

Video.summary: Bambi is a high-class call girl in the Los Angeles area who explains her life as a prostitute. Then Tiffany confronts their pimp C.T. about selling her for sex without her knowledge.
Video.title: High Class Call Girls

Video.summary: Jessyca thinks that Shon and Mellisa may be in a secret relationship. Char’s man gets revenge sex.
Video.title: Catfights Over Dogs

Video.summary: Fritz will do anything to help his cousin out - even sleep with his fiancee! Bradley's mom and wife confront him over his affair with his mom's doppelganger!
Video.title: Strange Secret Affairs!

Video.summary: Jimmy reveals his affair with his girlfriend's bestfriend Evoni. Derek's affair with girlfriend's best friend.
Video.title: I Stole My Best Friend's Man

Image.alt: I Stole My Best Friend's Man
I Stole My Best Friend's Man
I Stole My Best Friend's Man

Video.summary: Destiny confronts her friend about trespassing on other people's property; a confession of epic proportions could be a deal breaker; a hidden secret may alter a couple's plans.
Video.title: Stone Cold Sisters

Video.summary: Unemployed Sebastian has been badgering his girlfriend, Dee, for months to become a stripper and star in adult films. Later Steve tells his girlfriend that he's secretly been videotaping their sex sessions and broadcasting them over the Internet!
Video.title: My Secret Will Shock You!

Video.summary: Tori confesses that she has been sleeping with her mother's boyfriend; Tabitha wants her man to admit to his wrongdoing; Daniel pleads his case through song.
Video.title: Mom, We're Sleeping With Your Man

Image.alt: Mom, We're Sleeping With Your Man
Mom, We're Sleeping With Your Man
Mom, We're Sleeping With Your Man

Video.summary: Derrick reveals a secret he has been keeping from the woman he has been seeing; lesbian stripper Diana is on a mission to break up one relationship and start a new one; Summer is a lesbian who cannot stop having sex with men.
Video.title: Lesbians Come Out ... of the Cold

Image.alt: Lesbians Come Out ... of the Cold
Lesbians Come Out ... of the Cold
Lesbians Come Out ... of the Cold

Video.summary: Richie will tell Shelly he has been sleeping with DeeDee, a transsexual and Lesley, a transgender female. Then Gina will confess to her boyfriend, Rob, that she is sleeping with his best friend, Joe!
Video.title: Naughty Lovers Confronted

Video.summary: Benny has been cheating on Tamika with his ex-girlfriend and Maria has had it with Tim’s former mistress.
Video.title: Mistresses Attack

Video.summary: After Marcus got out of prison, he found his calling with the lord and quickly established himself as a minister. But he hasn't exactly freed himself of trouble, because he's been sleeping with two women, Nay and Strawberry!
Video.title: Sex With Two Sisters!

Video.summary: Wayne doesn't know his fiancee, Kristin, is sleeping with her cousin! Next Springer Cam is there when JB drops the bomb on both of his girlfriends and tells them he's been cheating. Later Vinnie is sleeping with his best friend's fiancee, Shannon.
Video.title: Engagements Explode!

Video.summary: There's no worse time to clash with your family than during the holidays! Donna and Richard return!
Video.title: Holiday Hell With My Feuding Family

Image.alt: Holiday Hell With My Feuding Family
Holiday Hell With My Feuding Family
Holiday Hell With My Feuding Family

Video.summary: Johnny's family hates his wife and his sister is here today to destroy his marriage. But, Johnny's wife isn't going quietly! Next Mitchell is here to confront his boyfriend about his boyfriend's decision to become a woman!
Video.title: The Springer Showdown

Video.summary: Today we're exposing the sexy lives of porn stars and those who seek to become them.
Video.title: Who Wants To Be A Porn Star 2

Image.alt: Who Wants To Be A Porn Star 2
Who Wants To Be A Porn Star 2
Who Wants To Be A Porn Star 2

Video.summary: Anthony found out he fathered Brittany’s son a year ago and now learns she’s a lesbian! Timmy tells Jaime he’s been dating Ashley online! Josh fights to get his baby mama Katie back from his best friend Nate!
Video.title: I'm A Lesbian and I'm Leaving

Image.alt: I'm A Lesbian and I'm Leaving
I'm A Lesbian and I'm Leaving
I'm A Lesbian and I'm Leaving

Video.summary: Carla has been cheating on her man with his best friend and his sister! Next Yvonne will tell her friend, Marie, that she's been sleeping with her boyfriend. Then Mary Sue and her secret lover, Cory, are here to confront Mary Sue's boyfriend, Scott.
Video.title: Honey, I'm Leaving You!

Video.summary: Briget wants the rumors about her boyfriend's cheating to stop; Samantha says her best friend has turned into her worst enemy; Moniqua wants to get her ex-boyfriend's new baby-mama out of the picture.
Video.title: Fight Fest

Video.summary: Erin's tired of playing house and is ready to tell Eric she's been cheating, and she's moving on! Then Bill's been cheating on his girlfriend for some time and is ready to move on. But wait until she hears he's been sleeping with her step-sister!
Video.title: I'm Done!

Video.summary: Jackie is here to confront her sister, Rachael, for stealing her husband!
Video.title: Brawling Over Babes!

Video.summary: Jamie is here today to confront her mother and they do indeed face off over Mom's bad behavior. Then Karla and Tiffany have a secret to confess to their respective husbands ... they're sleeping together!
Video.title: I'll Never Forgive You!

Video.summary: A man wants to get back with his ex-girlfriend; a woman seeks to end two relationships; a man tries to save his marriage.
Video.title: Bring It, Bro!

Video.summary: Antoine has been hiding the fact that he is gay from his family and his girlfriend. Now he wants to let them know the truth, and furthermore that he has been having a relationship with his sisters boyfriend.
Video.title: A Gay Family Affair

Video.summary: Stripper Tiny wants to get Brandon away from his baby's mother; Brad decides to take matters into his own hands when his wife refuses to quit stripping.
Video.title: High End Stripper Smackdown

Video.summary: Insecure Star likes Deandre, but he prefers her stripper cousin; Dominic has a confession to make to his girlfriend; Kristin cheats with her husband's teenage nephew.
Video.title: I Used You for Sex & Money ... Sorry

I Used You for Sex & Money ... Sorry
